name: kraken-agent
description: Kraken Agent v1.3 - Triple-brain orchestrator with v2.0 narrative continuation. Planning/Execution/System brains run in parallel with real Docker execution and mechanical output verification.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm --bundle --external @opencode-ai/plugin
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:shark
scripts.build:shark: bun build shark-agent/src/index.ts --outdir shark-agent/dist --target bun --format esm --bundle --external @opencode-ai/plugin
